历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 5704 → 8099 → 5122 → 4574 → 6693, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2022, due to a gap, the ranking dropped sharply to 8099; from 2023 to 2024, it moved forward noticeably; in 2025, it moved back to 6693. The average over the past three years (2023–2025) is about 5463, with a baseline ranking of approximately 6693 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Shanxi Province was 237 in 2021, 228 in 2022, 230 in 2023, 230 in 2024, and 230 in 2025 (Physics Category). The 2026 plan remains at 230, unchanged from 2025, with no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 27th (stable between 23–27 in recent years), placing it among the top domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated for serious violations of discipline and law, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. In 2024, there were signs of a gap in admissions; in 2025, the admission score for a certain major in Chongqing was abnormally low. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 85th, with a general evaluation and moderate short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Basic Medicine A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, and Marxist Theory A-, indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly popular in society. Central South University has strong disciplinary layouts in these areas, attracting many candidates. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Central South University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the central region, which is an inter-provincial study destination for Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7% (in 2025, 28 students were enrolled in Shanxi, accounting for about 4.7% of the total national enrollment), which is moderately high, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6693, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi (slightly easing competition), a somewhat negative university reputation (mildly suppressing application enthusiasm), and numerous advantageous disciplines (enhancing attractiveness), it is expected that the 2026 ranking will move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6643, with a range of 6143–7143.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6143–7143, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Mathematics, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Science) as targets for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemical Engineering, Transportation) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<6143), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
